page.title: Notifications
page.description: Manage manual sends, notification templates, and event rules in one place.

dispatches.title: Recent dispatches
dispatches.description: Review final delivery records for manual sends, direct sends, and notifications generated from business events.

templates.title: Notification templates
templates.description: Maintain reusable title and body templates. The template event code is mainly for categorization and filtering, and is not strictly bound to an event rule.

rules.title: Event rules
rules.description: Event rules automatically send notifications after a business event occurs by matching the event code to a template and recipient selector. Scheduled, cron, and delayed time-based triggers are not supported yet.

send.title: Send notification
send.description: Create an in-app notification for the current tenant.

template.description: Templates render variables such as {memberUsernameExample} or {tenantNameExample}.

rule.description: Event rules turn business events into notifications without duplicating sending logic across features. Scheduled, cron, and delayed time-based triggers are not supported yet.
rule.noTemplates: Create a notification template before creating an event rule.

placeholders.title: Input a concise notification title
placeholders.body: Describe the notification body and next step
placeholders.actionUrl: Optional route or URL to open after clicking
placeholders.name: Human-readable template or rule name

inboxPage.title: Notification Center
inboxPage.description: Review all in-app notifications here and handle unread, archived, and jump actions.
inboxPage.listDescription: Use this page when the inbox grows beyond the quick preview.

empty.dispatchesDescription: Manual sends and automatic event pushes will appear here.
empty.templatesDescription: Create a template first, then bind it with an event rule.
empty.rulesDescription: Create an event rule to turn events such as member.joined into notifications.
